title: Authorization Receipt v0.1
description: A verifiable record of a REAL, explicit, least-privilege, expiring, revocable grant of authority from a human principal to an agent. The structural INWARD complement to the work-record receipt (outward). This is verifier INPUT -- a checker validates an action against the receipt -- it is NEVER read back into a model context as pre-authorized state. additionalProperties is false at every level. Authority MUST expire (expires_at required). Scope is an explicit ALLOWLIST (default-deny: empty allowed_actions = nothing permitted). The authoritative recursive forbidden-field-name guard lives in proof_surface.authorization_receipt.

authorization_version.description: Schema version pin. Must be exactly '0.1'.

receipt_id.description: Unique, non-empty identifier for this specific grant.

principal.description: The REAL human or account that grants authority. Never a fabricated appointment.

id.description: Identifier of the granting human/account (e.g. username, user UUID).

role.description: Optional role label for the principal (e.g. 'project-owner', 'team-lead').

agent.description: The agent that receives the grant.

id.description: Identifier of the agent (e.g. agent name, session ID).

intent.description: Plain-language description of what is authorized. Non-empty.

scope.description: Explicit ALLOWLIST scope. Default-deny: an empty allowed_actions list authorizes NOTHING.

allowed_actions.description: Exhaustive list of permitted action kinds. Empty array = nothing permitted (default-deny).

allowed_targets.description: Exhaustive list of permitted targets. Empty array = any target is permitted for allowed actions.

max_actions.description: Optional upper bound on total actions under this grant.

granted_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime (with timezone) at which the grant takes effect.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime (with timezone) at which the grant expires. Authority MUST expire; this field is required.

revoked.description: True if this grant has been explicitly revoked before its natural expiry.

$comment: Forbidden field names (rejected by name at every object level by the reference validator -- the identical set as work-record-receipt): federal_appointment, oversight_principals, operator_role, judgment_owner, proof_policy, policy_boundary, authorization_context_mode, model_authorization_behavior, guardrail_posture, consume_verified_native_state, lossy_neutral_embedded_state, sovereignty_capsule, self_applicable, recursion_depth, prefire, run_state.
